title: Hour
description: An Hour object describes a range of date and time-related information for a specific Australia Post outlet or facility.

end_date.description: The end date of an operating period, when non-standard hours are observed. The date is returned in the format DD/MM/YYYY. For example, "30/06/2016".

end_time.description: The time when an outlet or facility closes on a particular day, in the format hh:mm. For example, 23:15.

start_date.description: The start date of an operating period, when non-standard hours are observed. The date is returned in the format DD/MM/YYYY. For example, "29/06/2016".

start_time.description: The time when an outlet or facility opens on a particular day, in the format hh:mm. For example, 09:00.

type.description:
The hour type, representing the hours of operation at a location. There are six possible enumerated values: 
 * HOURS: Standard operating hours when a location is open. 
 * LUNCH: The lunchtime period when a location is closed. 
 * HATCH: The hours when the parcel pickup customer service counter is open. 
 * SPECIAL_HOURS   Non-standard operating hours at a location. 
 * SPECIAL_CLOSED  Non-standard closing times at a location. 
 * SPECIAL_LUNCH: A non-standard time when a location is closed for the lunchtime period. 
 **Note: ** Times are specific to the location of the point, expressed as local time at that point.

weekday.description: Day of the week, enumerated from Monday (0) to Sunday (6).
